title: BLOCK 1 FINAL: Alphabet mastery test
description: Closing test for Block 1 — full alphabet, sentences, 25 WPM target
text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog and watches the river flow under a wide blue sky
tips: Pass this and Block 1 is closed — you can type any English text

character_tips.anna: 🎓 BLOCK 1 FINAL! Pass this and you've mastered the alphabet. Next: punctuation.
character_tips.maxim: End of Block 1. You can type any English word now. Block 2 opens up punctuation.
character_tips.knopych: BOSS BATTLE! 🐉 Defeat the dragon to unlock Block 2! 🏆
character_tips.klavochka: Final test, sunshine! You've come so far! Believe in yourself! ✨
